# Questions in Livestream 194

Live Stream #194: Vancouver City V

Time links open the YouTube video at the relevant timestamp.

| Time | Question | Short answer / answer direction |
|---:|---|---|
| <a href="https://youtu.be/b4lWcz28fMw?t=488" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">8:08</a> | If Joseph knew Egyptians disliked shepherds, why did he still present his family that way in Genesis 46? | He argued Joseph was distinguishing them as livestock herders rather than ordinary sheep shepherds and was managing Egyptian court prejudice more than Pharaoh himself. |
| <a href="https://youtu.be/b4lWcz28fMw?t=1039" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">17:19</a> | How did David handle stress before, during, and after written exams? | He said the main answer was deep preparation, steady review, and avoiding last-minute cramming. |
| <a href="https://youtu.be/b4lWcz28fMw?t=1160" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">19:20</a> | Do you expect new evidence for the Exodus, and what kind would it be? | He said future discoveries would likely include more route cities and towns such as Pi-hahiroth-area sites once excavation conditions improve. |
| <a href="https://youtu.be/b4lWcz28fMw?t=1387" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">23:07</a> | Is there Egyptian evidence for Joseph's one-fifth tax on crops in Genesis 47:26? | Yes. He said Egyptian tax records preserve that sort of taxation and that a 20 percent rate is well attested. |
| <a href="https://youtu.be/b4lWcz28fMw?t=1542" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">25:42</a> | What is wrong with Johnny Walker? | He said he dislikes the flavor profile and is not a fan of that style of whiskey. |
| <a href="https://youtu.be/b4lWcz28fMw?t=1709" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">28:29</a> | What is the difference between a rabbit and a bunny? | He said bunnies are domesticated pet forms of rabbits, especially the European rabbit. |
| <a href="https://youtu.be/b4lWcz28fMw?t=1928" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">32:08</a> | Who or what is Azazel in Leviticus 16:8? | He argued Azazel there is not a demon but the scapegoat rite, the symbolic driving out of sin from the camp. |
| <a href="https://youtu.be/b4lWcz28fMw?t=2141" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">35:41</a> | How do you pronounce Greek eta? | He said the pronunciation is fluid because Greek pronunciation changed over time and some details remain uncertain. |
| <a href="https://youtu.be/b4lWcz28fMw?t=2979" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">49:39</a> | Was Noah's wife drunk in the incident with Ham? | He discussed Genesis 9 and treated the question in connection with Noah's drunkenness and the household context of the passage. |
| <a href="https://youtu.be/b4lWcz28fMw?t=4184" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">1:09:44</a> | Will the Egypt trip produce a live video or recorded videos? | He said they planned to make recorded videos and that his new camera was part of that preparation. |
| <a href="https://youtu.be/b4lWcz28fMw?t=6244" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">1:44:04</a> | When was Daniel written? | He said he would put Daniel in the sixth century, while noting that many scholars argue for a later second- or third-century date. |
| <a href="https://youtu.be/b4lWcz28fMw?t=6615" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">1:50:15</a> | Did death occur outside Eden before the first sin? | He said the English text does not directly answer that question and discussed it as an interpretive issue rather than a settled prooftext. |
| <a href="https://youtu.be/b4lWcz28fMw?t=6942" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">1:55:42</a> | Do you accept Heiser's divine council worldview? | He said he needed the abbreviation clarified, then addressed it as the divine council worldview and treated parts of it as useful while not simply adopting every claim. |
| <a href="https://youtu.be/b4lWcz28fMw?t=7188" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">1:59:48</a> | Is the divine council the same as El's council of Canaanite gods? | He said Ugaritic texts do have a council of gods, but biblical usage and Israelite theology need to be distinguished from Canaanite myth in context. |
| <a href="https://youtu.be/b4lWcz28fMw?t=7545" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">2:05:45</a> | If science discovered God's method of creating everything and it differed from Genesis 1-2, should Genesis still be read for its message? | Yes. He said Genesis 1-2 is not presenting a modern scientific method but a theological and contextual message. |
| <a href="https://youtu.be/b4lWcz28fMw?t=7911" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">2:11:51</a> | How many Hyksos dynasty kings do we know? | He said several are known, gave examples, and cautioned that the evidence is fragmentary. |
| <a href="https://youtu.be/b4lWcz28fMw?t=8012" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">2:13:32</a> | Was Yakel one of the kings known from seals? | He said Yakel is known from seals but is a 14th Dynasty king, not a Hyksos king. |
| <a href="https://youtu.be/b4lWcz28fMw?t=8093" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">2:14:53</a> | Was the 16th Dynasty similar to the 14th Dynasty? | No. He said the 16th Dynasty reflects the Theban retreat after the 13th Dynasty loses its northern base, while the 14th Dynasty is a different group of Semitic warlords. |
| <a href="https://youtu.be/b4lWcz28fMw?t=8250" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">2:17:30</a> | How did other scholars react to Lorenzo Nigro's paper? | He said conservative scholars were encouraged, while many others responded with silence or discomfort. |
| <a href="https://youtu.be/b4lWcz28fMw?t=9657" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">2:40:57</a> | What do you think about Egypt's New Capital project? | He called it ambitious and described New Cairo as a major developing urban area with substantial new construction. |
| <a href="https://youtu.be/b4lWcz28fMw?t=9923" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">2:45:23</a> | Did Darius II order Jewish mercenaries to destroy Egyptian temples, leading Egyptians to destroy Jewish temples in 410 BC? | He said he would need to check the chronology before making that argument. |
| <a href="https://youtu.be/b4lWcz28fMw?t=11281" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">3:08:01</a> | How should Christians deal with slavery in the Bible without downplaying it? | He treated it as a serious interpretive and moral issue that should be handled honestly in its ancient legal and cultural setting. |
| <a href="https://youtu.be/b4lWcz28fMw?t=13961" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">3:52:41</a> | Is Jericho in Joshua just a small settlement with limited security rather than a major city? | He said the biblical text calls it a city but does not require a major urban center, and that assuming a large city is eisegesis. |
| <a href="https://youtu.be/b4lWcz28fMw?t=14910" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">4:08:30</a> | Did Egyptians have records of Noah's flood? | He said he has not claimed that Egyptians had records of Noah's flood and that, to his knowledge, they did not believe in a global flood that way. |
| <a href="https://youtu.be/b4lWcz28fMw?t=15006" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">4:10:06</a> | What is your opinion of <em>The Shepherd of Hermas</em>, and is it biblical? | He said it is a Christian book but not canonical Scripture, even though some early Christians valued and debated it. |
| <a href="https://youtu.be/b4lWcz28fMw?t=15396" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">4:16:36</a> | Where do you think the Reed Sea was? | He located it in the northwest Sinai, in one of the lakes of the Pelusiac estuary connected to the Mediterranean lagoon system. |
